name: OmopObservationComponentView
title: Observation.component[] → measurement / observation (FHIR-flat, stage 1; per-component fan-out)
description:
Fan-out Observation.component[] into one staging row per component. The canonical use case is blood pressure: an outer Observation with code 85354-9 and two components 8480-6 (systolic) + 8462-4 (diastolic).

Unlike the previous version this view carries the component code generically (component_code_system + component_code from the first coding) instead of hard-coding LOINC, so stage 2 resolves it through cm.fhir_system_to_omop_vocab — same as the top-level Observation view. Stage 2 (_resolve_observation_component.sql) resolves once, dedups per (id, component_code, std_concept_id), and routes by std.domain_id; the sibling SQLs are trivial domain filters over staging.observation_component_resolved.

column.name: status
column.description: Parent Observation.status; stage-2 filters entered-in-error / cancelled / unknown.

column.name: component_code_system
column.description: Component code system → Athena vocabulary_id via cm.fhir_system_to_omop_vocab.

column.name: component_value_code_system
column.description: When component.value[x] is CodeableConcept (PRAPARE answers, survey responses): system of first coding → value_as_concept_id via cm.fhir_system_to_omop_vocab + Maps-to.
